title: Senior Teacher - IIM Calcutta - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Calcutta - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIM Calcutta, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Calcutta:
IIM Calcutta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
